01_initial_request.target_name: RecA nucleoprotein filament and RecN protein
01_initial_request.input_data: Caulobacter crescentus cells with a single induced double-strand break and fluorescently tagged RecA-YFP
01_initial_request.user_intent: To elucidate the dynamics of in vivo homology search and investigate the role of RecN in facilitating long-distance DNA repair
01_initial_request.quantifiable_goal: Quantify RecA filament mobility, length variation, and pole-to-pole traversals driven by RecN

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] RecA and RecN dynamics in Caulobacter crescentus need to be studied in vivo. [Gap] Specific strains with fluorescent tags and inducible breaks are required. [Decision] To achieve strain generation, chose to use Two-step recombination method to perform chromosomal modifications on Caulobacter crescentus, expecting to obtain strains with integrated markers.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Strains with integrated fluorescent markers or gene deletions created.

references.relevance: Describes plasmids for vanillate- and xylose-inducible gene expression in Caulobacter.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Chromosomal modifications require delivery into cells. [Gap] Efficient transfer method needed. [Decision] To achieve gene transfer, chose to use PhiCr30 to perform transductions on Caulobacter cultures, expecting to obtain modified strains.

[Background] Strains are ready. [Gap] DSB needs to be induced at a specific site. [Decision] To achieve DSB induction, chose to use Chemical induction (Vanillate/Xylose/IPTG) to perform regulated expression of endonuclease on Caulobacter cells, expecting to obtain single double-strand breaks.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: DSB induced, cells synchronized (non-replicating predivisional or swarmer).

references.relevance: Describes I-SceI system in C. crescentus.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] DSB induced in WT cells. [Gap] RecA filament dynamics need to be visualized. [Decision] To achieve visualization, chose to use Nikon Eclipse Ti-2E Microscope to perform time-lapse imaging on RecA-YFP cells, expecting to obtain fluorescence images.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Time-lapse images of RecA-YFP and MipZ acquired.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Images acquired. [Gap] Quantitative data on filament mobility and length needed. [Decision] To achieve quantification, chose to use NIS-elements software to perform image analysis on RecA localizations, expecting to obtain centroid positions and filament lengths.

parameters.analysis: centroid position xc, filament length l

02_agent_trajectory.observation: RecA filament translocation, length variation, and pole-to-pole traversals quantified.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] WT dynamics established. [Gap] Role of RecN needs to be tested. [Decision] To achieve RecN ablation, chose to use Two-step recombination method to perform recN gene deletion on Caulobacter, expecting to obtain recN-deleted strains.

[Background] recN-deleted strain ready. [Gap] RecA dynamics in absence of RecN need to be observed. [Decision] To achieve observation, chose to use Nikon Eclipse Ti-2E Microscope to perform imaging on recN-deleted cells, expecting to obtain fluorescence images.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: RecA filament static, no translocation observed.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] RecN deletion shows static filaments. [Gap] Mechanism of RecN action (ATPase) needs testing. [Decision] To achieve mechanistic insight, chose to use Two-step recombination method to perform recN mutant generation (Walker A/B) on Caulobacter, expecting to obtain ATPase mutant strains.

references.relevance: Structural and functional characterization of RecN.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Mutant strains ready. [Gap] RecA dynamics in mutants need to be observed. [Decision] To achieve observation, chose to use Nikon Eclipse Ti-2E Microscope to perform imaging on recN mutant cells, expecting to obtain fluorescence images.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: RecA filaments static, length variations affected differently by mutants.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Imaging complete. [Gap] DNA loss around DSB needs measurement. [Decision] To achieve measurement, chose to use Illumina HiSeq 2500 to perform whole-genome sequencing on genomic DNA, expecting to obtain sequencing reads.

references.relevance: Describes WGS assay for DSB processing.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Sequencing data obtained. [Gap] Reads need to be aligned to reference. [Decision] To achieve alignment, chose to use BWA to perform read indexing and alignment on sequencing reads, expecting to obtain aligned reads.

references.relevance: Fast and accurate short read alignment.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Reads aligned. [Gap] Multiply mapped reads need removal. [Decision] To achieve filtering, chose to use SAMTOOLS to perform read filtering on aligned reads, expecting to obtain filtered reads.

[Background] Reads filtered. [Gap] Read counts per genomic bin needed. [Decision] To achieve counting, chose to use BEDTOOLS to perform read count calculation on filtered reads, expecting to obtain read counts per bin.

references.relevance: Flexible suite of utilities for comparing genomic features.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Read counts calculated. [Gap] Profile needs smoothing for visualization. [Decision] To achieve smoothing, chose to use MatLab to perform Lowess smoothing on read count data, expecting to obtain read enrichment profile.

[Background] RecA-RecN interaction suggested by colocalization. [Gap] Physical interaction needs confirmation. [Decision] To achieve confirmation, chose to use Bacterial Two-Hybrid System to perform interaction assay on RecA and RecN, expecting to obtain interaction data.

mean_traversal_time.interpretation: Time taken for RecA filament to traverse pole-to-pole.

mean_traversals.interpretation: Average number of pole-to-pole traversals before homology pairing.

filament_fractional_length.interpretation: RecA filament occupies a small fraction of cell length.

repair_events.interpretation: Percentage of cells completing repair within imaging window.

03_success_verification.final_verdict: The research objective was achieved. RecN was identified as essential for RecA filament translocation and length variation during homology search, driven by its ATPase cycle.
